title: Silky Roasted Italian Tomato Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly and vegetarian-friendly umami-rich dish featuring roasted tomatoes with raisins for a touch of sweetness and depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup canned diced tomatoes (no salt added)

instructions: Cut the tomato into small chunks and place in a bowl.
Drizzle olive oil over the tomatoes, sprinkle with salt, pepper, red chili flakes, and garlic if using. Toss gently until evenly coated.
Spread the tomatoes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, ensuring they are not overcrowded to allow for even roasting.
Roast in the preheated oven for about 15-20 minutes or until the tomatoes turn golden brown and start to caramelize. Stir occasionally during roasting to ensure even browning.
While the tomatoes are roasting, place raisins in a small bowl with enough water to cover them. Let soak for about 5 minutes to soften slightly.
Once the tomatoes have roasted and cooled slightly, remove from oven. Add the softened raisins to the tomatoes, mix well, and serve hot or at room temperature as desired.
